title: Agrivoltaic Panels Allow Farmers to Harvest Energy - IEEE Spectrum
description: Efforts to combine solar technology and farming — known as agrivoltaics — have been underway for a decade. In the past several years, some researchers have begun exploring the use of PV panels that allow some light through, rather than simply capturing it all and casting shade.
bodyText: Plant-friendly wavelengths pass right through the translucent arrays Peter Fairley is a contributing editor for IEEE Spectrum. Solar filters emit a blue light over tomato plants growing in a research field at UC Davis in 2022.
